ac_closure.evidence: Makefile:72 writes version.json post-build; examiner confirmed out/version.json exists with non-empty version field
Makefile passes NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION=$(BUILD_VERSION) to npm run build; next.config.mjs reads env var first — single value flows to bundle and version.json
Both use git rev-parse --short HEAD (unique per commit); Date.now() fallback when git unavailable

useUpdateChecker.ts:47 fetch with ?t= and cache:no-store; unit test confirms options
All three trigger paths call same checkForUpdate() at :61,69,75
try/catch at :46-57; res.ok guard; type guard; unit tests cover all fail-soft branches

latched var prevents re-trigger; shouldShowUpdate:24 false when alreadyLatched
Chakra Alert (not modal); e2e confirms nav visible while banner shown
No reload in hook; reload only via user button click
useState(false) session-only; not persisted; e2e confirms dismiss hides banner
i18n.ts updateBanner in Copy type, en, de; UpdateBanner uses useCopy()
Makefile two-step lftp: mirror --exclude version.json then put version.json; runtime verification via MV-1

manual_validation.evidence: Makefile two-step lftp (mirror --exclude version.json then put version.json) verified by code review. Structural guarantee: lftp sessions are sequential; second upload only runs after first completes.

git rev-parse --short HEAD is unique per commit by definition. Fallback (date +%s) uses Unix epoch seconds. Different commits in the same second are theoretically possible but acceptable per spec decision D3.
cache: no-store + ?t=<ms> cache-busting verified in code (useUpdateChecker.ts:47). Hosteurope cache-header investigation is a post-deploy task per spec sec.4.1. Accepted as deferred investigation.

gate_runs.detail: 48 mutants: 7 killed, 0 survived, 41 NoCoverage. NoCoverage = hook body (useEffect/setInterval/addEventListener) requires jsdom; project runs Vitest in Node mode without jsdom — structural constraint. Survived=0: all tested paths (shouldShowUpdate pure function) are well-covered. ACCEPT.

Fast suite: 51/51 passed including all 7 update-detection tests. Groups suite failure (groups-ever-known-survives-leave: leave-group-confirm-btn not found) is pre-existing from admin role management epic — not caused by this feature.

Two Opus passes. Findings acted on: F1 (fallback clock divergence fixed via Makefile env var pass-through), F2 (lftp mirror fail-exit gate added), F4 (TypeScript Window declaration), startup-delay networkidle regression (hook now has 2-second startup window), negative e2e test vacuity (waitForTimeout 500→2500ms). Not acted on: F3 (shadow-init unit tests — structural limitation, no jsdom available). Codex Stage 2: skipped (not configured). All 51 fast-suite e2e tests and 1215 unit tests pass after remediation.

residuals: 41 NoCoverage mutants in hook body (useEffect, setInterval, event listeners) — structurally untestable without jsdom; project uses Node-mode Vitest
